title: BetterNether Ambient Mobs
description: Adds just the two ambient mobs from the BetterNether mod.
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a92dbf14144dffaee251017058aa90bee067c5a8.png) ### WARNING: If you are looking for the complete original [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) mod this is NOT it! Although it doesn't cause a conflict, you shouldn't install both mods at the same time. BetterNether is a great mod, but one of its best features is its two ambient mobs: the **firefly** and the **hydrogen jellyfish**. Those two mobs and their spawn eggs are the **only thing** the mod features, so you can continue playing in your world without the rest of the BetterNether stuff if you don't want it there. Both mobs spawn in any biome in the Nether, including biomes from other mods. Mob icons are included if you use [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap). ### **Works in Forge with [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)!** - All rights to the original creators of BetterNether: [quiqueck](https://modrinth.com/user/quiqueck) and [paulevs](https://modrinth.com/user/paulevs). - All rights to the firefly icon from the RP: [Hellim's Xaero's Maps Mob Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hellims-xaeros-maps-mob-icons) ---

⚠️ Warning: Official Download Sources #### Beware! My content is **only** distributed for download from Modrinth and CurseForge.
#### Any other site doing so is **NOT** me!
